title: Notification issued u/s 7(1) (b) of COFEPOSA Act against Shri Ram Kishan Dass @ Ram Kishan
description: Notification issued u/s 7(1) (b) of COFEPOSA Act against Shri Ram Kishan Dass @ Ram Kishan
text: Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) (CENTRAL ECONOMIC INTELLIGENCE BUREAU) (COFEPOSA UNIT) ORDER New Delhi, the 2nd November, 2010 Whereas the Joint Secretary to the Government of India, specially empowered under sub-section (1) of section 3 of the Conservation of Foreign Exchange and Prevention of smuggling Activities Act, 1974 (52 of 1974) issued order F.No. 673/23/2010-Cus.VIII dated 20.09.2010 under the said sub-section directing that Shri Ram Kishan Dass @ Ram Kishan, S/o Late Shri Bishan Saroop, R/o 25/75, Shakti Nagar, Near Kamla Nagar, Delhi 110007 be detained and kept in custody in the Central Prison Tihar Jail, Delhi with a view to preventing him from smuggling goods in future. 2. Whereas the Central Government has reasons to believe that the aforesaid person has absconded or is concealing himself so that the order cannot be executed. 3. Now therefore, in exercise of the power conferred by clause (b) of sub-section (1) of Section 7 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby directs the aforesaid person to appear before the Commissioner of Police, Delhi within 7 days of the publication of this order in the official Gazette. [F.No. 673/23/2010-Cus.VIII] RASHEDA HUSSAIN, jt. Secy. -- 1 of 1 --
